Operation 'search-images' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely - added concise action-oriented summary. Description is comprehensive but could be improved by explicitly stating the return value (paginated image list) for better AI agent understanding of what to expect from the response.

data.current_description:
Search for images in your library. This request supports pagination using the `page` and `limit` parameters.

You can search by:
- **Alt text content**: Search for words or phrases in alt text (default behavior)
- **Asset ID**: Find a specific image by its unique identifier
- **URL**: Search by image URL substring

The search automatically detects the query type based on its format.
data.summary_suggestion: Search library images by alt text, asset ID, or URL
data.description_suggestion: Search for images in your library by alt text content, asset ID, or image URL. The search automatically detects the query type based on its format. Supports pagination via `page` and `limit` parameters. Returns a paginated list of matching images with their metadata and generated alt text.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely - added concise action-oriented summary. Description is comprehensive but could be improved by explicitly stating the return value (paginated image list) for better AI agent understanding of what to expect from the response.

message: Operation 'bulk-create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks context about asynchronous processing, return values, and asset_id assignment. Added details about async processing, response structure, and how to track uploaded images for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Upload and process a CSV of image URLs that need alt text. Valid rows will be processed, and invalid rows will be returned in the `row_errors` response field.
data.summary_suggestion: Bulk upload image URLs from CSV file
data.description_suggestion: Upload and process a CSV file containing image URLs to generate alt text in bulk. Valid rows are queued for asynchronous alt text generation. Returns a response containing the bulk upload ID, processing status, and any validation errors from invalid rows in the `row_errors` field. Each image is assigned an asset_id for tracking.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks context about asynchronous processing, return values, and asset_id assignment. Added details about async processing, response structure, and how to track uploaded images for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'page-scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description is detailed but could clarify what the immediate response contains versus what's available after async processing. Added summary and clarified response contents, processing model, and asset_id assignment for better AI agent understanding of timing and tracking.

data.current_description:
Crawl and scrape a web page or HTML document, generating alt text for all images on the page. Scraped images will be queued for asynchronous alt text generation in the background. The API response will contain the details of the parsed images from the HTML (but not the final generated alt text). The maximum time allowed to download a URL and parse the HTML is 3 seconds. If the source HTML page is unable to be ingested within that time, the API will return an error response.

NOTE: The crawler *does not* execute Javascript or script tags on the source HTML page. It will only locate HTML `img` elements in the page source.
data.summary_suggestion: Scrape web page and queue images for alt text
data.description_suggestion: Crawl and scrape a web page or HTML document to extract all images and queue them for asynchronous alt text generation. The API response contains parsed image details (URLs, dimensions, existing alt text) but not final generated alt text, which will be available after background processing completes. Maximum download and parse time is 3 seconds. Note: The crawler only processes HTML `img` elements and does not execute JavaScript or script tags. Each scraped image is assigned an asset_id for tracking.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is detailed but could clarify what the immediate response contains versus what's available after async processing. Added summary and clarified response contents, processing model, and asset_id assignment for better AI agent understanding of timing and tracking.

data.current_description:
Update an image with new data.

**Note**: You cannot update the URL of an exist image.
data.summary_suggestion: Update image metadata and alt text
data.description_suggestion: Updates metadata and alt text for an existing image identified by asset_id. Accepts an ImageUpdate object with modifiable fields such as alt text, keywords, and custom prompts. Returns the updated Image object. Note: The image URL cannot be modified - to change the image source, delete and recreate the image. Partial updates are supported.

Operation 'search-images' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely - operation needs a concise action-oriented summary. Description is good but lacks explicit mention of pagination support in the return value and could clarify that results are paginated. Added summary and enhanced description for better AI agent interpretability regarding what gets returned.

data.current_description:
Search for images in your library. This request supports pagination using the `page` and `limit` parameters.

You can search by:
- **Alt text content**: Search for words or phrases in alt text (default behavior)
- **Asset ID**: Find a specific image by its unique identifier
- **URL**: Search by image URL substring

The search automatically detects the query type based on its format.
data.summary_suggestion: Search library images by alt text, asset ID, or URL
data.description_suggestion: Search for images in your library by alt text content, asset ID, or image URL. The search automatically detects the query type based on its format. Supports pagination via `page` and `limit` parameters. Returns a paginated list of matching images with their metadata and generated alt text.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely - operation needs a concise action-oriented summary. Description is good but lacks explicit mention of pagination support in the return value and could clarify that results are paginated. Added summary and enhanced description for better AI agent interpretability regarding what gets returned.

message: Operation 'bulk-create' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_input_details, missing_output_details. Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity on CSV format expectations, that processing is asynchronous, and what the response object contains. Enhanced both to clarify input format requirements, processing behavior, and response structure for better AI agent decision-making.

data.current_description: Upload and process a CSV of image URLs that need alt text. Valid rows will be processed, and invalid rows will be returned in the `row_errors` response field.
data.summary_suggestion: Bulk upload image URLs from CSV file
data.description_suggestion: Upload and process a CSV file containing image URLs to generate alt text in bulk. The CSV should contain image URLs in rows. Valid rows will be queued for asynchronous alt text generation. Invalid rows will be returned in the `row_errors` response field with error details. Returns a BulkUpload object containing processing status and any validation errors encountered.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description lacks clarity on CSV format expectations, that processing is asynchronous, and what the response object contains. Enhanced both to clarify input format requirements, processing behavior, and response structure for better AI agent decision-making.

message: Operation 'page-scrape' has semantic quality issues: vague_summary, missing_context. Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could better clarify what information is returned in the immediate response versus what comes later. Added concise summary and refined description to emphasize the asynchronous nature and what data is immediately available versus pending, improving AI agent understanding of operation timing and response content.

data.current_description:
Crawl and scrape a web page or HTML document, generating alt text for all images on the page. Scraped images will be queued for asynchronous alt text generation in the background. The API response will contain the details of the parsed images from the HTML (but not the final generated alt text). The maximum time allowed to download a URL and parse the HTML is 3 seconds. If the source HTML page is unable to be ingested within that time, the API will return an error response.

NOTE: The crawler *does not* execute Javascript or script tags on the source HTML page. It will only locate HTML `img` elements in the page source.
data.summary_suggestion: Scrape web page and queue images for alt text
data.description_suggestion: Crawl and scrape a web page or HTML document to extract all images and queue them for asynchronous alt text generation. The API response contains parsed image details (URLs, dimensions, existing alt text) but not the final generated alt text, which will be available after background processing completes. Maximum download and parse time is 3 seconds per page. Note: The crawler does not execute JavaScript - it only processes static HTML `img` elements in the page source.
data.reasoning: Missing summary entirely. Description is comprehensive but could better clarify what information is returned in the immediate response versus what comes later. Added concise summary and refined description to emphasize the asynchronous nature and what data is immediately available versus pending, improving AI agent understanding of operation timing and response content.

data.current_description:
Update an image with new data.

**Note**: You cannot update the URL of an exist image.
data.summary_suggestion: Update image metadata and alt text
data.description_suggestion: Updates metadata and alt text for an existing image identified by asset_id. Accepts an ImageUpdate object with fields such as custom alt text, keywords, or custom prompts. The image URL cannot be modified - to change the image, delete and recreate it. Supports partial updates - only provided fields will be modified. Returns the updated Image object.
data.reasoning: Missing summary. Description is incomplete - doesn't explain what can be updated, what inputs are expected, or what is returned. Added details about updateable fields, URL immutability, partial update support, and return value for AI agent clarity.

data.summary_suggestion: Delete image from library by asset ID
data.description_suggestion: Permanently deletes an image from your library using its asset_id. This action cannot be undone. The image record and all associated alt text data will be removed. Returns a success response with no body content (204 No Content).
